basics.name: Jasper Van
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer
basics.summary: Jasper is an experienced engineer with over a decade in computer programming and the past seven years focused on cloud-native infrastructure, platform engineering, and AI agentic collaboration. He is highly proficient in Kubernetes, Istio, Argo, and Knative. A dedicated open-source creator and contributor, Jasper is active in both the Istio and Kubernetes communities and passionate about building agent-first developer tools and developer platforms.

work.name: Li Auto Inc.
work.summary: Spearheaded the development and infrastructure of the company's internal function platform, handling over 10,000 functions with a peak QPS of 300,000. Engineered a container platform utilizing ArgoCD, which facilitated the management and operations of dozens of components across hundreds of Kubernetes clusters.
highlights: ArgoCD / ArgoWorkflow
Knative / Fission
Istio / Envoy / Coder
IaC / GitOps / Flux

work.name: Igetget Co., Ltd
work.summary: Spearheaded the design and development of a proprietary API gateway, seamlessly handling a peak of 250,000 QPS and managing thousands of millions of daily requests. Masterfully developed the data plane autonomously, showcasing expertise in proxy technology at both L4 and L7 layers.
highlights: API Gateway / Microservices
Ecommerce System / B2C
Kubernetes / Tekton

skills.name: AI & Agentic Engineering
keywords: Claude Code / Copilot / Gemini API Integrations

projects.name: AgentKanban
projects.description: An agent-first task board designed to act as mission control for an AI workforce.
highlights: Designed and developed a collaborative workspace where human developers and autonomous AI coding agents (Claude Code, Gemini, etc.) seamlessly coordinate.
Implemented cryptographic identity verification (Ed25519) for AI agents to sign and track their contributions, commits, and pull requests securely.
Engineered a self-organizing task decomposition framework enabling agents to autonomously create, delegate, and manage complex engineering task lifecycles.

projects.name: AnyManagedAgents
projects.description: An open-source orchestration tool and runtime designed to manage, monitor, and deploy heterogeneous AI coding agents across distributed environments.
highlights: Engineered a unified runtime for launching and managing multiple AI coding agents with fully isolated execution contexts.
Implemented dynamic resource allocation and state monitoring to manage parallel agent workloads on Kubernetes.
Designed a robust API and event gateway to stream agent logs, shell execution outputs, and workspace changes in real-time.

projects.name: FlareAuth
projects.description: A lightweight, modern, and highly secure cloud-native authentication and identity management service built on top of Cloudflare Workers.
highlights: Designed and developed a serverless authentication system running on the edge, drastically reducing latency for user login and token validation.
Implemented standard authentication protocols including OAuth2 and OIDC with secure session management.
Built a clean TypeScript developer SDK for easy auth integration in modern web applications.

projects.name: ZPan
projects.description: A self-hosted cloud drive base on the cloud storage. Alternative to Google Drive / Dropbox / OneDrive.
highlights: Garnered over 19k stars on GitHub.
Supports high-speed uploading and downloading without limited by server bandwidth.
Support all cloud storage compatible with S3 protocol.
Support file & folder management and sharing.
Support document preview and audio and video playback.
